title: Conduct a document review
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Conduct a document review demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Plan the document review

pcs.text: Determine the objectives, scope and criteria for the document review
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Determine the objectives, scope and criteria for the document review?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Determine the objectives, scope and criteria for the document review.

pcs.text: Identify relevant and current regulatory and commercial requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify relevant and current regulatory and commercial requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify relevant and current regulatory and commercial requirements.

pcs.text: Define audit client and reporting processes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Define audit client and reporting processes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Define audit client and reporting processes.

pcs.text: Select an audit team with appropriate technical expertise against the scope
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select an audit team with appropriate technical expertise against the scope?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select an audit team with appropriate technical expertise against the scope.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Plan the document review

elements.title: Develop document review checklist

pcs.text: Develop checklist questions against the document review criteria
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Develop checklist questions against the document review criteria?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Develop checklist questions against the document review criteria.

pcs.text: Validate the checklist and ensure it covers all applicable regulations and/or commercial requirements as defined by the scope
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Validate the checklist and ensure it covers all applicable regulations and/or commercial requirements as defined by the scope?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Validate the checklist and ensure it covers all applicable regulations and/or commercial requirements as defined by the scope.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Develop document review checklist

elements.title: Conduct document review

pcs.text: Identify and retrieve required workplace documents for review from workplace system
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and retrieve required workplace documents for review from workplace system?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and retrieve required workplace documents for review from workplace system.

pcs.text: Establish the authenticity of the documents being reviewed
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Establish the authenticity of the documents being reviewed?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Establish the authenticity of the documents being reviewed.

pcs.text: Review documents against the prepared checklist, and determine compliance with each element on the checklist
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Review documents against the prepared checklist, and determine compliance with each element on the checklist?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Review documents against the prepared checklist, and determine compliance with each element on the checklist.

pcs.text: Identify and raise non-conformances against nominated criteria
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and raise non-conformances against nominated criteria?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and raise non-conformances against nominated criteria.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Conduct document review

elements.title: Report on outcomes of document review

pcs.text: Collate and report on findings according to workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Collate and report on findings according to workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Collate and report on findings according to workplace requirements.

pcs.text: Consult with relevant personnel and raise corrective actions where required according to workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Consult with relevant personnel and raise corrective actions where required according to workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Consult with relevant personnel and raise corrective actions where required according to workplace requirements.

pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Close out audit?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Close out audit.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Report on outcomes of document review

elements.title: Confirm and close out corrective actions

pcs.text: Evaluate the effectiveness of the corrective action after an agreed time interval
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Evaluate the effectiveness of the corrective action after an agreed time interval?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Evaluate the effectiveness of the corrective action after an agreed time interval.

pcs.text: Close out corrective actions according to workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Close out corrective actions according to workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Close out corrective actions according to workplace requirements.

pcs.text: Report on the document review and corrective actions taken
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Report on the document review and corrective actions taken?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Report on the document review and corrective actions taken.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E5: Confirm and close out corrective actions

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
